features: Artificial wildflower decoration is about 25.6 inches/65 cm long. It can be placed in a vase, added to a bouquet full of flowers and green plants, or used to decorate parties and homes to create a warm and romantic festive atmosphere and celebrate the beautiful time of spring and summer.

Nothing can better reflect the atmosphere of spring and summer than a beautiful bouquet of fake wildflowers. Use it to decorate your dining table, counter or anywhere you want to feel the beauty of nature, decorate every room in your home or office, or it can be a perfect gift for relatives and friends or any special occasion.

The beautiful wildflower bouquet features daisies, poppies and roses, dotted with spring flowers, Persian ferns, eucalyptus leaves, lavender and willow leaves. They are lifelike and look particularly beautiful when placed alone in a vase or paired with other floral works.

Spring and summer are a great time to bloom colorful colors. Silk flower arrangements mixes elegant purple, pink and bright yellow, suitable for any occasion that needs bright flowers, also suitable for summer table decoration and Easter table centerpiece, its beautiful and classic look is enough to impress everyone present.

You can bend or trim the bouquets, DIY flower arrangements, use them to make your own wreaths and spring and summer garlands. Perfect for weddings, parties, home, garden, hotel, table decoration, kitchen, fireplace, tabletop decoration and vase filling.
description: 4 Pcs artificial wildflower bouquets, let spring and summer never fade! Artificial wildflower flower arrangements can easily fill various vases, and a single flower can also support the entire floral design. The interweaving of daisies, roses, poppies and eucalyptus leaves makes the bouquet full and colorful, and even the texture of the stamens is realistically restored. Wildflower bouquet can be used for multiple purposes and can be bent and trimmed, making it very suitable for DIY wreaths, wedding arches, and table centerpieces. Whether you want to create a stunning centerpiece or decorate your ceremony and reception space, these flowers are your ideal choice. The colorful combination of purple, yellow and pink complements any wedding color scheme and adds a touch of elegance and charm to your special day. DIY wildflower bouquets Wildflower bouquets come in a variety of sizes and shapes, so you can easily create enviable and beautiful flower arrangements. Pairing different varieties of spring and summer flowers will add depth and layering to your bouquet, making it the focus of your decoration.
